backend/main.mo: Main actor for the complaint management system, handling complaint submission, status updates, officer management, attendance logging, and user profiles with role-based access control via mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module that upgrades OldComplaint records (lacking statusLog) to NewComplaint records by adding an empty statusLog field.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the admin-only 'Update Status' section on the Complaint Detail page (with status log history table and update form) to its implementing files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated one-to-two sentence summaries for all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes including sidebar, chart, and semantic UI colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app at #root and loading the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with login, layout, dashboard (admin-only), submit-complaint, complaint detail, and officers routes, all wrapped in AuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Persistent app shell with a sticky nav bar featuring the UP Police logo, role-based navigation links, user badge, and logout button, plus a footer.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard that redirects unauthenticated users to /login and optionally blocks non-admin users from admin-only routes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides a React context-based authentication system with hardcoded credentials, supporting login/logout with session persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication using AuthClient, managing login state and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on complaints, officers, and attendance by wrapping backend actor calls with useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for a government/UP Police-themed light and dark color palette.
frontend/src/lib/i18n.ts: Defines English and Hindi translation strings for the complaint submission form UI, including labels, placeholders, and error messages.
frontend/src/lib/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a printable HTML complaint receipt document with styled sections for complaint details, status, and officer information.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions for class name merging, complaint number formatting, nanosecond timestamp formatting, and status label/color mapping.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintDetail.tsx: Displays full details of a single complaint identified by complaint number, allowing admins to assign officers, record attendance, update status, download attachments, and generate a PDF report.
frontend/src/pages/ComplaintsDashboard.t: Shows a paginated, filterable table of all complaints with summary stat cards (total, pending, in-progress, resolved) and links to individual complaint detail pages.
frontend/src/pages/Login.tsx: Renders a bilingual (English/Hindi) login form that authenticates users via the useAuth hook and redirects admins to the dashboard or regular users to the complaint submission page.
frontend/src/pages/OfficersManagement.ts: Provides a form to add new officers with validation and a table listing all registered officers, using the useListOfficers and useAddOfficer hooks.
frontend/src/pages/SubmitComplaint.tsx: Bilingual complaint submission form that collects applicant details, validates input, optionally uploads a PDF/JPG attachment, and displays the generated complaint number on success.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with helpers to persist/retrieve values via sessionStorage and clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended typography/font families, border radius, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a bilingual complaint management app ('PS Sadar Bazar Application Box') with its architectural notes, existing features, known issues, and versioning metadata.
